caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt, is positioned in a recording studio. She is speaking into a professional microphone, with her hand resting near her chin. Behind her is a black wall featuring a yellow vertical stripe and a screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text, along with the phrase "Employees Only" in smaller white text. To her right, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" in red and black, and another logo to the left says "PODCAST" below a graphic. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, though she subtly shifts her facial expression and head tilt as she continues speaking. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, focusing on the woman from the chest up as she engages in a conversation.
